title: Stage 2 — domain selection
description: Picks ≤4 domains from the controlled menu in vocabulary/domains.tsv so the next stage's prompt only ships those domains' keyword banks. Can be rule-based or LLM-assisted. See LLM_FUNNEL_SPEC.md §4.

selected_domains.description: Domain ids from vocabulary/domains.tsv. Order doesn't matter. Soft cap at 8 to bound the next-stage prompt size.

rationale.description: Optional per-domain one-line reason. Keys are domain ids. Useful for audit and replay.
